use_cases: Toggle between list and grid view modes in content-heavy applications
Switch display layouts in dashboard or admin interfaces
Provide intuitive navigation controls with tactile button feedback
Enable view customization in data-rich interfaces
Navigate between different content organization modes
ai_summary: A skeuomorphic navigation component featuring list and grid icon toggles designed for dark-themed interfaces. The component implements realistic, tactile button styling with hover and click interactions, making it ideal for dev tools, SaaS dashboards, and fintech applications. Provides a premium, tactile user experience for switching between view modes.
